refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall maintain teleoperation communication quality such that packet loss does not exceed the customer-defined limit under agreed network conditions.
refined_fr.rationale: Refining the original FR clarifies the performance metric (packet loss) and ties it explicitly to customer-defined limits and network conditions, ensuring measurable and testable requirements.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure packet loss percentage during teleoperation sessions under controlled network conditions and verify compliance with customer-defined limits.
sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system modules.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement adaptive bitrate and error correction algorithms for teleoperation data streams.
DP2: Use redundant communication channels to reduce effective packet loss.
DP3: Integrate real-time packet loss monitoring and feedback control.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Implement adaptive bitrate and error correction algorithms for teleoperation data streams.

potential_sources: Interaction between communication adaptation and teleoperation control logic.
Dependency on network link quality and telemetry data.
coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically isolates communication quality management within teleoperation data streams, minimizing coupling with other system functions.

assumptions_risks: Assumes network conditions are within agreed parameters.
Risk that adaptive algorithms may introduce latency affecting operator control.
Assumes availability of sufficient processing resources in teleoperation module.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Monitor latency impact and consider fallback mechanisms if adaptive bitrate causes control degradation.

im_boundary.name: Teleoperation
im_boundary.scope: Software and hardware components responsible for teleoperation control, communication management, and data processing.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Bi-directional communication channel for teleoperation data streams subject to packet loss.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Interface to send real-time packet loss and communication quality metrics to NGHE Solution.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives teleoperation commands and task instructions.

module_containment_scores.notes: Contains overall system but teleoperation communication logic is diffused if placed here.
Vehicle module is physical hardware focused; poor containment for communication algorithms.
Best containment for communication quality management and adaptive algorithms.
Safety services focus on alerts and policies, not communication quality.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning DP1 to Teleoperation module centralizes communication quality management, minimizing diffusion and improving maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential latency impact on teleoperation control if adaptive algorithms are not optimized.
Dependency on Network Link interface quality and stability.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Ensure robust interface specifications and performance testing between Teleoperation and Network Link.

fr_dp_gate.reason: Selected DP (adaptive bitrate and error correction) directly addresses the refined FR of maintaining packet loss within limits.

diffusion_risks: Minimal diffusion risk as DP is contained within Teleoperation module.
Potential risk if communication adaptation logic is duplicated elsewhere.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Teleoperation module shows highest containment score and lowest diffusion score, supporting clear ownership.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and network link monitoring is feasible within Teleoperation module.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of communication quality management to Teleoperation module with defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Monitor latency and control responsiveness during adaptive bitrate implementation.
Define clear interface contracts for Network Link and Telemetry to ensure data integrity.

decision.justification: The functional decomposition level is complete with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. All gates pass with manageable risks and clear ownership.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Monitor real-time packet loss during teleoperation.
FR2: Adapt communication parameters to maintain packet loss within limits.
FR3: Report packet loss status to relevant system modules.

revise.why: No immediate revisions required; proceed to next decomposition level.

assumptions: Network conditions remain within agreed parameters.
Processing resources in Teleoperation module are sufficient.
open_risks: Latency impact of adaptive bitrate algorithms on operator control.
Dependency on Network Link interface stability.
evidence_needed: Performance testing results of adaptive bitrate under realistic network conditions.
Telemetry data confirming packet loss compliance.
